speaker: speaker1
text: Hello , is this the ABC company ?

speaker: speaker1
text: We have just arrived from Tokyo only ... looking for a reserve car of your company . All of above , we cannot find it .

speaker: speaker2
text: Let me see . Oh , yes , we have your reservation number .

speaker: speaker1
text: You mean you haven ’ t arranged any car ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I ’ m sorry to say no .

speaker: speaker1
text: Here I ’ ll take taxi instead , how do you refund us ?
